La IA está usando todo el historial de e: The AI is using the full history of this conversation
Hola, gracias por escribirnos. ¿En qué p: Hi, thanks for reaching out. How can we help you?
QipuCRM centraliza tus negociaciones, co: QipuCRM centralizes your deals, contacts, WhatsApp, and electronic invoicing in a single system. Built for sales teams in Peru.
CRM para equipos de ventas en Perú: CRM for sales teams in Peru
QipuCRM es el sistema de gestión comerci: QipuCRM is the sales management system built for Peruvian sales teams. Kanban pipeline, contacts, AI-powered WhatsApp conversations, products, and SUNAT electronic invoicing integrated into a single platform.
Una plataforma completa, sin apps extra: A complete platform, with no extra apps or complicated integrations.
Visualiza tus negociaciones en etapas pe: Visualize your deals in custom stages. Move deals with drag & drop and know exactly which phase each opportunity is in.
Base de datos centralizada de clientes y: Centralized database of customers and prospects with interaction history, linked deals, and tax data for invoicing.
Bandeja de entrada de WhatsApp directame: WhatsApp inbox right inside the CRM. Link conversations to deals and reply from a single panel.
Activa un asistente con inteligencia art: Enable an artificial intelligence assistant per conversation. It answers common questions automatically and escalates when needed.
IA activable por conversación: AI you can enable per conversation
Crea tu catálogo una vez y reutilízalo e: Create your catalog once and reuse it in any deal. Add product lines with prices, quantities, and discounts.
Genera facturas y boletas de venta direc: Generate invoices and sales receipts directly from the deal. Send to SUNAT, download the XML, and get the CDR response without leaving the CRM.
QipuCRM cubre todo el ciclo de ventas en: QipuCRM covers the entire sales cycle in one continuous flow.
El prospecto llega por WhatsApp o lo cre: The prospect comes in via WhatsApp or you create them manually. They get linked to the pipeline.
Mueve la negociación en el Kanban, agreg: Move the deal across the Kanban, add products, comments, and activities.
La IA de WhatsApp ayuda a responder duda: The WhatsApp AI helps answer questions. Follow up until closing.
Genera la factura o boleta desde la mism: Generate the invoice or receipt from the same deal and send it to SUNAT.
No es una herramienta genérica traducida: It's not a generic translated tool. QipuCRM includes SUNAT electronic invoicing, WhatsApp Business integration, and everything in soles and dollars.
¿Necesito instalar algo?: Do I need to install anything?
No. QipuCRM es 100% web. Funciona desde: No. QipuCRM is 100% web-based. It works from any browser on PC or mobile, with no installations.
¿Puedo tener varios equipos o empresas?: Can I have multiple teams or companies?
Sí. Puedes crear múltiples equipos dentr: Yes. You can create multiple teams within your account, each with its own pipelines, contacts, and settings.
¿La facturación electrónica requiere alg: Does electronic invoicing require anything special?
Solo necesitas tu RUC, usuario SOL y el: You only need your RUC, SOL user, and SUNAT digital certificate. You can also enable test mode to try it out without sending real documents.
¿El WhatsApp necesita el número oficial: Does WhatsApp require my company's official number?
Sí, se conecta mediante la API oficial d: Yes, it connects via the official WhatsApp Business API (Meta). It only works with numbers approved by Meta.
¿La IA de WhatsApp responde sola o neces: Does the WhatsApp AI reply on its own or do I need to supervise it?
Puedes activarla o pausarla por conversa: You can enable or pause it per conversation. When active it replies automatically; when you pause it, the human agent takes over.
Muéstrate el sistema con tus propios dat: See the system with your own data. A specialist guides you in 30 minutes and answers all your questions about QipuCRM.
QipuCRM está listo para tu equipo. Pipel: QipuCRM is ready for your team. Pipeline, contacts, WhatsApp with AI, and electronic invoicing in a single system.
